description: Style noteLightweight and warm this jacket from just natural is ideal for windy days or cold nights. Its padded interlining and elasticated hemline gives you a snug Fit and does not allow body heat to escape outside. Pair it with distressed denim jeans and sneakers for a look that is practical yet stylish.Product DetailsBlack matt finish jacket, padded interlining, mock collar, full two piece sleeves, detachable red zippered front, placket covering zipper with press button closure, two slant welt pockets in front, yoke at front and back, red corded piping at front yoke, branding at left chest, elasticated bottom hem and sleeve hemMaterial and carePolyester, NylonDry clean onlyDo not iron Size and FitThe model (height 5'8"and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
